subcodes.title: Words to the ship's doctor, spoken on 1913-12-05
subcodes.first_line: Divine civilization is peace, love and unity. The East has been the founder of divine civilization, but the West the spreader of material civilization.
subcodes.subjects: @East and West; communication between East and West, @spiritualization of humanity in the future; a new race of men, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @unity; oneness of humanity, @universal peace; world unity
